title: BETWEEN and equivalent comparison operators produce inconsistent results with COLLATE NOCASE
description:
### What happens?

DuckDB's `BETWEEN` operator and its logically equivalent comparison operators (`<` and `>`) produce inconsistent results when one operand uses `COLLATE NOCASE`. The `BETWEEN` expression returns `true` while the equivalent `OR` comparison returns `false`, violating the expected logical equivalence.

According to the [DuckDB documentation](https://duckdb.org/docs/stable/sql/expressions/comparison_operators#between-and-is-not-null): *"Note that `BETWEEN` and `NOT BETWEEN` are only equivalent to the examples below in the cases where both `a`, `x` and `y` are of the same type, as `BETWEEN` will cast all of its inputs to the same type."* However, `typeof()` shows that all operands have the same base type (`VARCHAR`), suggesting the issue lies in collation handling rather than type differences.

This issue does not occur in SQLite with the same queries, indicating it's specific to DuckDB's implementation.


### To Reproduce

```sql

SELECT 'B' NOT BETWEEN ('A' COLLATE NOCASE) AND 'a'; -- true
SELECT 'B' < ('A' COLLATE NOCASE) OR 'B' > 'a'; --false


SELECT typeof('B'), typeof('A' COLLATE NOCASE), typeof('a');
--┌─────────────┬────────────────────────────┬─────────────┐
--│ typeof('B') │ typeof('A' COLLATE NOCASE) │ typeof('a') │
--│   varchar   │          varchar           │   varchar   │
--├─────────────┼────────────────────────────┼─────────────┤
--│ VARCHAR     │ VARCHAR                    │ VARCHAR     │
--└─────────────┴────────────────────────────┴─────────────┘
```



### OS:

Ubuntu 24.04.1 LTS, x86_64, Linux 6.14.0-1010-aws (AWS EC2)

### DuckDB Version:

v1.4.0-dev4117 (Development Version) 15fba9f47c

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

AWS EC2 instance

### Full Name:

Runyuan He

### Affiliation:

The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR);
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE name NOT BETWEEN 'A' AND 'B';
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE name < 'A' OR name > 'B';
key_bug_features: BETWEEN operator inconsistent with COLLATE NOCASE
